questionHtml: In one throw the coins all land heads upwards. The following throw results in 7 heads and 3 tails. Calculate, in terms of kB, the change in entropy between the two throws.

meta.title: In one throw the coins all land heads upwards. The following throw results in 7 heads and 3 tails. Calculate, in terms of kB, the change in entropy between the two throws.
